items.text: GCAS_singleton shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.0 and a step size of 0.1

items.text: GCAS_singleton shall define the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0

items.text: GCAS_singleton shall invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable height

items.text: GCAS_singleton shall set the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7

items.text: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, the computed height value must always be greater than minHeightAllowed

items.text: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, the current height value must be greater than the previous height value to indicate a pull-up trend
